productDisplayName: Redtape Men Pontoise Black Formal Shoes
description: Cut a dash with these low top shoes for the cosmopolitan male from red tape. Styled in sophisticated leather, wear them with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish hide jacket. Upper High quality leather upper for protection, comfort and durability Reinforced overlay for the heel Perforations all over the upper for enhanced ventilation and breathability Central lacing system Padded sockliner for instep comfort Midsole Rubber midsole for comfort Outsole Diamond patterned TPR outsole with a raised heel shoe care Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
